name: morfx-codex
description: Codex plugin wrapper for Morfx AST-safe code transformations over MCP.

interface.shortDescription: AST-safe code transforms with Morfx DSL selectors.
interface.longDescription: Morfx gives Codex a deterministic MCP server for querying and rewriting code by AST node instead of raw text. Use its DSL selectors, such as `func:* > call:os.Getenv`, for safer refactors, targeted replacements, staged edits, and recipe-driven code transformations.
defaultPrompt: Use Morfx DSL to query this repo by AST nodes.
Plan a safe Morfx refactor with target_dsl selectors.
Use Morfx MCP for a targeted AST replacement.
